violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Cloths at prep table, sani bucket was not made/ready to use at kitchen.

General equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of equipment did not meet a design characteristic specified in the food service code. -Black bag used to store raw hamburger patties in walk in cooler.
Water Supply. — --Nonpublic water supply was not tested by EPA-certified laboratory monthly for bacteriological analysis. -Documentation of monthly water samples unavailable at time of inspection.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Wall behind 3 comp sink is peeling/damaged.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
